question: You must not smoke, or carry a lighted cigarette, cigar, or pipe within 25 feet of any vehicle which contains:
canonical_answer:
1. Class 1 (Explosives)
2. Class 3 (Flammable Liquids)
3. Class 4 (Flammable Solids)
4. Class 4.2 (Spontaneously Combustible)
